title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 337.070 - Local governments prohibited from taxing or licensing psychologists
text:
337.070.  Local governments prohibited from taxing or licensing psychologists. — No person who has been licensed by the committee as a psychologist in this state shall be taxed or made liable to pay any municipal or other corporation tax or license fee of any description whatever for the privilege of following or carrying on such profession.
(L. 1977 H.B. 255 § 13, A.L. 1989 H.B. 738 & 720)
